https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/in.overview_zh: 测试用手动视频挂载：这个页面用于验证文章旁的 YouTube 图标、视频详情页、以及右侧时间片段跳转交互是否正常。后续当流水线能成功抓到 transcript 并调用模型时，这里会被真实的视频总结覆盖。
https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/in.overview_en: Manual test video attachment. This lets us verify the article-level YouTube icon, the dedicated video page, and timestamp jump behavior before transcript-backed summaries are available in the pipeline.

highlights.summary_zh: 从这里开始验证视频页面是否能正确从指定时间播放。
highlights.summary_en: Use this point to confirm the player starts from the requested timestamp.

highlights.summary_zh: 用于验证点击右侧摘要卡片后，左侧 iframe 是否会刷新并跳到对应时间。
highlights.summary_en: Use this to verify that clicking a summary card reloads the iframe at the matching time.

highlights.summary_zh: 这个片段主要用于测试较远时间点的跳转是否稳定。
highlights.summary_en: This jump is mainly for checking that larger seeks still work reliably.
